rationale: Gov't Code §2001.102 governs use of depositions in contested agency cases. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: A party is entitled to use a deposition taken under this subchapter in the contested case pending before the state agency without regard to whether a cross-interrogatory has been propounded.
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns administrative hearing procedure, unrelated to homestead exemption valuation.
